title: ayenia cubensis
intro: Ayenia cubensis, a species of flowering plant in the family Malpighiaceae, is native to Cuba and is also known as Cubensis or Small Leaf Ayenia. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Ayenia cubensis include its potential to treat various skin conditions, such as acne and eczema, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Ayenia cubensis can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or by using a tincture, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions or taken orally to aid in digestion and reduce inflammation.
